calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Arlene Howell, CSR# 2542. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-03-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR #4280.

Michael P. Guta appeared with plaintiff Isaias Orozco, who was placed under oath and examined.
Inna Kurikova was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
Arthur Rugama, Esq. appeared with defendant Jose Rodriguez, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on October 1, 2008.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Guta.

In accordance with the terms of the agreement, defendant Jose Rodriguez shall pay plaintiff Isaias Orozco the sum of $7,000.00. This amount shall be paid two installments. The first installment of $3,500.00 shall be paid no later than 5:00 p.m. on January 14, 2009. The second installment o $3,500.00 shall be paid no later than 5:00 p.m. on February 17, 2009. Both checks shall be made payable to the Law Office of John Hill Trust Account. If these terms are met by defendant Jose Rodriguez, plaintiff Isaias Orozco shall, within five business days, dismiss this case with prejudice.

Additionally, no later than 5:00 p.m. on January 14, 2009, plaintiff Isaias Orozco shall return to defendant Jose Rodriguez the check for $520.97 made payable to the Labor Commissioner.
This Agreement is enforceable pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 664.6.

Matter is continued to March 3, 2009 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.
